name: Cornish Hens and Wild Rice
recipeIngredient: Wild Rice OR Wild & Long Grain rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the hens and season the outside with salt and pepper.
2. Sauté green onions in olive oil until fragrant.
3. Chop giblets and parsley, then sauté them in olive oil until soft.
4. Bring wild rice (or wild and long grain rice) to a boil, add sautéd ingredients, mushrooms, and almonds.
5. Stuff the cavities of the hens with this mixture.
6. Tie the legs together securely.
7. Melt more olive oil and drizzle apricot brandy over the outside of the hens.
8. Place the hens in a roasting pan with at least 1 inch of water at the bottom to steam up.
9. Bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes, or until golden brown. You can continue adding melted oil and brandy during serving if desired.
10. Serve with acorn squash and Caesar salad, or baked Hubbard squash.
